creator: f.roman.f+bsdbugs@gmail.com
text:
Thanks!

I'm afraid I don't have enough knowledge (yet...) to submit a patch. Also, I think that Squid dependency is wrong. I used Dansguardian with Squid 3.3 and I'm sure it works with Squid 3.5 (with Linux, I must confess). The dependency should be with any squid.
